title: On the Isle of Samoa
writer: Brenda Weisberg, Harold Greene, Joseph Stanley
actors: Jon Hall, Susan Cabot, Raymond Greenleaf
plot: Ex-flyer Kenneth Crandall is surprised by his boss in an Australian nightclub, while attempting a robbery. Papita, Crandall's accomplice and the boss's wife, is shot and killed by her husband, but Crandall escapes with the money. ...
